entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the target crop for growth promotion and nitrogen fixation studies

entities.name: ICCV 2
entities.description: A cultivar of chickpea used in the study

entities.name: JG 11
entities.description: A cultivar of chickpea used in the study

entities.name: RHIZOBIA-LIKE-BACTERIA
entities.description: Bacteria isolated from chickpea nodules characterized for nitrogen fixation and growth promotion

entities.name: NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The process of converting atmospheric nitrogen into ammonia, performed by the bacteria

entities.name: GROWTH PROMOTING ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of the bacterial isolates to enhance plant growth

entities.name: NIFH GENE
entities.description: A gene associated with nitrogen fixation amplified in the bacterial isolates

entities.name: FIELD CONDITIONS
entities.description: The environment where the chickpea varieties were treated with bacteria

entities.name: NODULE NUMBER
entities.description: The count of nodules on the plant roots, enhanced by bacterial treatment

entities.name: NODULE MASS
entities.description: The weight of the nodules on the plant roots, enhanced by bacterial treatment

entities.name: SHOOT MASS
entities.description: The weight of the plant's shoot system, enhanced by bacterial treatment

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, enhanced by bacterial treatment

entities.name: ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: A measure of carbon in the rhizosphere soil, enhanced by bacterial treatment

entities.name: TOTAL NITROGEN
entities.description: A measure of nitrogen in the rhizosphere soil, enhanced by bacterial treatment

entities.name: AVAILABLE PHOSPHOROUS
entities.description: A measure of phosphorus in the rhizosphere soil, enhanced by bacterial treatment

entities.name: RHIZOSPHERE
entities.description: The soil region surrounding the plant roots where nutrient enhancement was observed

entities.name: INDOLE ACETIC ACID
entities.description: A plant growth-promoting hormone produced by the bacterial isolates

entities.name: BETA-1,3-GLUCANASE
entities.description: An enzyme produced by the bacterial isolates

entities.name: HYDRO CYANIC ACID
entities.description: A chemical produced by most of the bacterial isolates

entities.name: SIDEROPHORE
entities.description: An iron-binding molecule produced by most of the bacterial isolates

entities.name: 16 S RDNA GENE
entities.description: A gene used for the taxonomic identification of the bacterial isolates

entities.name: PANTOEA DISPERSA
entities.description: A bacterial species identified from the isolates

entities.name: CHRYSEOBACTERIUM INDOLOGENES
entities.description: A bacterial species identified from the isolates

entities.name: PSEUDOMONAS GENICULATA
entities.description: A bacterial species identified from the isolates

entities.name: STENOTROPHOMONAS PAVANII
entities.description: A bacterial species identified from the isolates

entities.name: STENOTROPHOMONAS MALTOPHILIA
entities.description: A bacterial species identified from the isolates

entities.name: CHRYSEOBACTERIUM SP.
entities.description: A bacterial species of the genus Chryseobacterium identified from the isolates

entities.name: STENOTROPHOMONAS ACIDAMINIPHILA
entities.description: A bacterial species identified from the isolates
